name: @xpaysh/storefront-audit
description: Conformance + readiness auditor for agentic-commerce storefronts. Checks /llms.txt, /.well-known/ucp, schema.org JSON-LD on PDPs, robots.txt AI-crawler allowlist, A2A agent-card, RFC 9728 OAuth resource metadata, and rejects fictitious well-known URIs. Library + CLI (ac-doctor). Pure-HTTP; zero auth needed; zero runtime deps.
author: xpay✦ <hello@xpay.sh>
